name: CAE Inc.
description: CAE Inc. is a global leader in delivery of training for the civil aviation, defense and security, and healthcare markets. The company designs and manufactures flight simulators and training devices, and provides training services, simulation technologies, and operational support. Headquartered in Canada, CAE operates a vast network of training centers worldwide, helping commercial airlines, business aircraft operators, defense forces, and healthcare institutions improve safety, efficiency, and readiness through advanced simulation and digital solutions.
